metadata.siteDescription: Notes about diving and the underwater world

footer.description: Diver's Notes — a personal diving blog: dive notes, dive site reviews, and underwater photography.

home.title: Diver's Notes — Diving Blog
home.metaDescription: Diver's Notes — a personal diving archive by Egor, PADI Assistant Instructor and underwater photographer. Dive notes, dive site reviews, dive map, and a marine life database.
home.intro1: Hi, I'm Egor — a PADI Assistant Instructor and underwater photographer. Since 2023, I've been documenting my experience: where I've dived, what I've seen, and what I've learned underwater.
home.intro2: This is my personal dive log, notes about diving, dive site descriptions, marine life, and other interesting things in the world of diving.

blog.title: Blog
blog.metaDescription: Dive notes, dive site reviews, and theory for divers.
blog.subtitle: Articles about diving: theory, dive site reviews, and personal experience.

marineLife.title: Marine Life I've Encountered Underwater
marineLife.metaDescription: Photos and descriptions of marine life encountered during dives. Behavior, habitats, and interesting facts about each species.
marineLife.subtitle: Photos and descriptions of marine life encountered during dives. Behavior, habitats, and interesting facts.

map.metaDescription: My dive map: coordinates and dive site list grouped by regions.
